turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, good morning. I would like to order a coffee today

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What kind of coffee would you like — maybe an espresso, latte, or cappuccino?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Like, Cappuccino with sugar, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — one cappuccino with sugar. Would you like that hot or iced today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hard is ok because the day is cold.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, a hot cappuccino then. Would you like it in a small, medium, or large cup?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Go, please, alive, and, if it is possible, with skim milk.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing! One large hot cappuccino with skim milk and sugar. Would you like to have it here or take it away?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Here, it seems a lovely place.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s great to hear! Would you like something to eat with your coffee — maybe a pastry or a sandwich?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Oh, that's a good idea. A sandwich sound perfect with mozzarella cheese, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Excellent choice! Would you like your mozzarella sandwich toasted or fresh?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Prefer toast with extra espinac, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Toasted mozzarella sandwich with extra spinach. Would you like any sauce or dressing on it — like pesto or mayonnaise?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, eh, besto. It will be okay.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! So, one large hot cappuccino with skim milk and sugar, and one toasted mozzarella sandwich with extra spinach and pesto. Would you like to pay by cash or card?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Cache, because today my cellphone doesn't have battery.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all! Would you like your coffee and sandwich served together or the coffee first?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Guess together! Inside it's a good option.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! I’ll bring your order to your table inside. Would you like to sit near the window or a quieter spot in the back?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Near the window.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect choice — it’s bright and cozy there. I’ll bring everything over soon. Anything else you’d like to add to your order?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, thank you. Thank you. That's all.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’ll bring your order right over. Enjoy your coffee and sandwich! ☕🥪 kay, I'll be waiting.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect! It won’t take long — relax and enjoy the view by the window. ☀️ —---------------: -------------
